What’s with the ethereal core announcement
Just started playing like a few weeks ago. Does it mean they won’t be able to get limited awakeners after some time?
you know what ethereal cores do yes?
essentially they act like limited pulls (luminous) until the end of a version when they revert to regular pulls (pure core)

Nah, it just means that if they run any new special events (anni special event, other, etc) those rewards will be ethereal cores (time limited cores that turn into pure cores after patch), but everything else will stay the same
and they announced they'll be swapping to them in the event shop, which created a backlash
